public_reproducibility.description: Fully reproducible datasets committed to Git. Used for sanity checks, ablation, and debugging.

external_benchmarks.description: Publicly available datasets NOT committed to Git. Referenced by download scripts with version pinning and checksum verification. Used for final ranking and cross-paper comparability.

evaluation_only.description: Evaluation artifacts not distributed in repository. Large binary files (H2 databases) used only in controlled evaluation environments.

kaggle_student_code.role_description: NOT used for primary ranking. Used for cross-domain generalization testing (student code vs algorithmic code). Complementary to BigCloneBench.

codesimilaritydataset.note: Already present locally. Not distributed in repo.

codexglue_clone.role_description: Microsoft CodeXGLUE Code Clone Detection dataset. Industry-standard benchmark for code clone detection with ~1.7M labeled Java function pairs.
codexglue_clone.note: Downloaded via HuggingFace datasets library. NOT committed to Git.

codesearchnet.role_description: CodeSearchNet dataset for training code embeddings and semantic similarity. Contains 457K Python functions with docstrings.
codesearchnet.note: Downloaded via HuggingFace datasets library. NOT committed to Git.

poj104.role_description: POJ-104 (PKU Online Judge) - Industry-standard benchmark for C code plagiarism/clone detection. Used by MOSS, JPlag, and academic papers for C language evaluation. Contains 53K C programs from 104 problems.
poj104.note: Downloaded via HuggingFace datasets library. NOT committed to Git.

codesearchnet_java.role_description: CodeSearchNet Java subset for training Java code embeddings. Contains 454K Java functions with docstrings.

codesearchnet_misc.role_description: CodeSearchNet subsets for JavaScript (124K), Go (318K), PHP (524K), and Ruby (49K). Used for multi-language embedding training.

codexglue_defect.role_description: CodeXGLUE defect detection dataset (C code from real-world projects). Contains 27K C functions with vulnerability labels. Useful for structural similarity evaluation.
codexglue_defect.note: From CodeXGLUE. NOT committed to Git.

evaluation_policy.key_rule: All reported final results are computed exclusively on external benchmark datasets. Public datasets are used only for validation and ablation.
